UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS STREET STUDIOS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, JOHBRO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 376 ELLIS STREET #405 CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78530966)
